channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender Geddy Lee Artist Series Signature Jazz Bass CIJ 2005 — $1,279
item.description:
$1,279 · Excellent · Cask Music

Fender Signature Geddy Lee Jazz Bass, 2005,  Crafted in Japan. Iconic aesthetic and really fun to play. Alder body, nice thin one-piece C-shaped maple neck and fingerboard with medium jumbo fretwire, black binding and black rectangular markers. Two vintage Jazz Bass single-coil pickups, chrome vintage-style tuners and a Badass Bass II bridge. Excellent, nearly mint condition with a couple of very very minor blemishes as pictured. Playing nicely, includes deluxe Fender soft case.

(Consignment)


- Shop Policies - Please Read -

**If you are located in the PST time zone, please message to confirm shipping rates

Please ask any questions regarding condition, payment, shipping or other details PRIOR to making an offer.

Absolutely no returns on any items unless they are not as described.

Please view the photos carefully for details of the items’ condition, and don’t hesitate to ask questions.

Guitars are set up and playing well in-store, and packed as thoroughly as possible to minimize any change to that. Sometimes the playability is affected by shipping time and conditions, and may require minor maintenance (setup, etc) upon arrival. Please anticipate this.

We pack all of our items very carefully and take pictures documenting the shipment process, to protect the buyer and seller in case of any issues.

Any issues with received items must be reported to Cask Music within 48 hours. We will work hard to resolve any problems with your item as respectfully and responsibly as possible.

**We are located in Hamilton, Canada. Cross-border shipping may incur fees for brokerage, customs and tarriffs. As per Reverb’s policies, these are ALWAYS the responsibility of the buyer.

When economically possible, we will favour faster shipping options to minimize the amount of time items are in transit. For some more valuable or delicate items, the faster option will be required.

item.title: Danelctro Silvertone Bass Guitar, 1960', Black Finish, "Player", Gig Bag — $799
item.description:
$799 · Good · Clark's Music

This is a Danelectro Silvertone bass guitar from the 1960's. The bass had been heavily modified over the years. Lots of holes were filled (see photos). It's now back to original. Plays and sounds good. The neck is straight and the action is good. Two tuners replaced with vintage ones. It's a "player". Not a collector's piece. Comes with a newer gig bag. Thanks for looking and best of luck!

item.title: Vega Power Jazz Bass Deluxe Mid-70s - Natural — $1,074.55
item.description:
$1,074.55 · Very Good · Mihnea's Gear Garage

For sale is a Vega Power Deluxe bass made in Japan by Matsumoku, a very solid and characterful vintage instrument with several high-quality upgrades.

This is the Deluxe version with a two-piece ash body, which makes it a more desirable and higher-spec version compared to the standard sunburst model often associated with pressed wood construction.

The bass has been upgraded with:

  • DiMarzio pickups
  • Upgraded electronics
  • Schaller bridge
  • Gotoh tuners

It is a great-playing and great-sounding instrument with lots of personality, strong build quality, and that unmistakable vintage Japanese feel. The upgrades make it a very usable player’s bass while still keeping the charm of an older Matsumoku-made instrument.

Cosmetically, it shows the normal signs of age and use you would expect from a vintage bass, but overall it presents very well and has clearly been cared for.

item.title: Fender Player Plus Active Precision Bass 3-Color Sunburst — $799
item.description:
$799 · Excellent · Garrett’s Gear

I bought this bass a year ago brand new with the intent of getting back into playing but just haven’t been able to make it happen. Still has the tags and plastic on it! Comes with a fender gig bag.

Powered by a Player Plus PJ pickup set, the Player Plus Precision Bass® delivers the punch and growl that defines Fender bass tone. A 3-band active EQ provides precise tone shaping with switchable active/passive operation for ultimate flexibility. The Player Plus Precision Bass neck is sleek, fast, and smooth thanks to its silky satin finish, comfortable rolled edges on a 12” inch radius fingerboard, and modern “C” backshape. A rock solid HiMass™ bridge provides sustain, resonance, and perfect intonation. With classic Fender style, advanced features and stunning new finishes, the Player Plus Precision Bass is the perfect tool to spark your creativity and stand out from the crowd.

Specifications

  • Case/Gig Bag: Included: Deluxe Gig Bag
  • Country Of Origin: Mexico
  • Body Material: Alder
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyester
  • Body Shape: Precision Bass
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane
  • Neck Shape: Modern “C”
  • Scale Length: 34” (86.36 cm)
  • Fingerboard Material: Pau Ferro
  • Fingerboard Radius: 12" (305 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 20
  • Frets Size: Medium Jumbo
  • Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.625” (41.3 mm)
  • Position Inlays: White Pearloid Dot
  • Middle Pickup: Player Plus Precision Bass®
  • Bridge Pickup: Player Plus Noiseless™ Jazz Bass®
  • Controls: Master Volume, Pan Pot (Pickup Selector), Treble Boost/Cut, Midrange Boost/Cut, Bass Boost/Cut, Active/Passive Mini Toggle
  • Configuration: PJ
  • Bridge: Fender HiMass™ with Chrome-Plated Zinc Saddles
  • Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
  • Tuning Machines: Standard Open-Gear
  • Pickguard: 3-Ply Mint Green
  • Control Knobs: Knurled Flat-Top
  • Neck Plate: 4-Bolt

item.title: Rouge VB-100 Violin Bass Guitar w/ Case — $264.34
item.description:
$264.34 · Excellent · 66MusicStore

Excellent condition w/ case.

item.title: 1977 Fender Precision Bass — $1,800
item.description:
$1,800 · Fair · Jeff's Gear Outlet

Here’s one you don’t see every day! This is a 1977 Fender Precision Bass that has an…interesting refinish. I believe the body is original, but it’s been stripped and has had some additional routing and holes as well as the route filled in from the pickups to the control cavity. The pickups are the passive EMG Geezer Butler set and the bridge is brand new from Fender. Custom pickguard was made to cover the extra routing and mount the controls. I have no idea who did the painting or what it says on the back. Google tells me it’s some sort of Comanche but I can’t get a good translation. Strings are fresh and it just had a setup so it’s ready to rip! Comes with the original hard case. Feel free to shoot me a message with any questions! Local pickup available between DFW and OKC.

item.title: ESP LTD D-6 2008 - 2018 - Natural Satin — $537.28
item.description:
$537.28 · Good · Bass Paradigm

The body of the ESP LTD D-6 Bass Guitar is shaped out of Merbau, a hardwood native to Southeast Asia giving it a dark hue similar to a mahogany. In fact, if it wasn't for the lighter maple of the 5-piece maple/mahogany neck-thru designed neck, you'd have a hard time discerning that this was a neck-thru design from outside appearances as the dark woods are a very close match. The neck itself is a thin "U" shape and with a double cutaway design making it easier for players of all sizes to access the frets with ease.

This standard scale (34") 6-string bass sports a 54mm standard nut, 24 XJ frets, a rosewood fingerboard, Grover tuners, an ESP DB-6 string-thru-body bridge, and black nickel hardware. The electronics include dual ESP SB-6 (bridge & neck) pickups with an ESP ABQ-3 3-band active EQ which lets you boost or cut lows, mids, and highs before the signal ever hits your amp.


Specs

  • Neck-thru-body
  • 34" scale
  • Merbau body
  • 5-piece mahogany/maple neck
  • Rosewood fingerboard
  • 54mm standard nut
  • Thin "U" neck contour
  • 24 XJ frets
  • Black nickel hardware
  • Grover tuners
  • ESP DB-6 bridge string-thru-body
  • ESP SB-6 (bridge & neck) pickups
  • ESP ABQ-3 3-band active EQ

item.title: Yamaha SBV-550 - Shelby Blue Japan Bass Guitar — $1,799
item.description:
$1,799 · Excellent · Japanese Guitar Company

The Yamaha SBV-550 is one of Yamaha’s most distinctive modern bass designs, combining retro Japanese styling with a versatile three-pickup layout and a comfortable, lightweight feel. Finished in a vibrant metallic blue with a matching headstock and aged white pickguard, this is an especially sharp-looking example.

The SBV-550 features three single-coil pickups with individual on/off push-button controls, allowing each pickup to be used independently or combined for a wide variety of tones. From deep, rounded low end to brighter and more articulate sounds, the unusual pickup arrangement gives this bass plenty of tonal flexibility.

It has just been cleaned, restrung, and professionally set up with nice low action. The electronics work properly, and the bass is ready to play.

Overall condition is excellent. There are only minor dings, small finish marks, light scratches, and normal signs of handling. The metallic blue finish remains vibrant and presents extremely well. The pickguard and white pickup covers show some light age-related discoloration, while the chrome hardware has minor surface wear consistent with normal use.

The frets show only light wear and have plenty of life remaining.

A great choice for anyone looking for something different from the usual bass designs, with unmistakable Yamaha styling, versatile electronics, and excellent playability.

Case: Soft

Scale Length: 34“

Nut Width: 1.6“

Fret Wear: 9.3/10

Action at 12F (6th): .08“

Action at 12F (1st): .08“

Weight: 8lbs 9oz

Overall Condition: 9/10

Cool Factor: 11 out of 10


USA Seller, check my feedback to see how I value my customers and see my other listings for more rare Japanese Guitars and other unique gear! I use recycled packaging for reduced environmental impact and ship all items 100% insured against loss or damage.


Internal Use (Bin) - PA-14-1

item.title: Sterling StingRay Ray35 with Roasted Maple Neck 2018 - Present - Purple Sparkle — $750
item.description:
$750 · Very Good · Trevor's Boutique

Near Mint Sterling StingRay5 in gorgeous purple sparkle.

I’m gonna miss just being able to look at this one. It’s beautiful.

The only issue is a small, maybe 2” line on the side of the forearm contour. Makes me think someone was a little over-zealous opening the shipping box. You can hardly feel it, and it’s difficult to see in most lighting. Obviously it doesn’t affect playability.

Just had it set up so i can affirm that the truss rod works and the bass plays wonderfully.

It will come with a used but still good condition Reunion Blues gigbag.

item.title: Fender Road Worn '60s Jazz Bass 2012 Rosewood Fingerboard — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Very Good · Al's Gear Depot

This bass plays great. It is all original with the exception of upgraded CTS pots. It has one of best looking rosewood fingerboards I've ever seen. Frets are good with minimal wear (see photos). Body is good with just the factory relic. It has a new set of Thomastik Flat wounds. It has a 7.25 neck radius. It is setup well with low action. Gig bag included. I will only ship to continental United States.

item.title: Guild Newark St. Collection Starfire I Bass '22 — $495
item.description:
$495 · Very Good · Dave's Guitar Shop

Very Good Condition, Cherry, Gloss Polyurethane Finish, Semi-Hollow Maple Body with Center Block, Modern Thin U-Shaped Mahogany Neck, Bound 12.5" Radius Indian Rosewood Fingerboard, Narrow Tall Frets, 1.5" Nut Width, 30.75" Scale Length, Guild BC-1 BiCoil Pickup, Master Volume and Tone Controls with Push/Pull "Vintage" Switch, Guild Tune-O-Matic Bridge with Harp Tailpiece and Open-Gear Vintage-Style Tuners, Neck Thickness .79" at the 1st Fret and .98" at the 12th Fret, 6.8 Pounds, Comes with a Hardshell Case.

*Please Note: There is some wear present on the pickups. Please refer to the photos.*

item.title: Fender American Standard Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2008 - 2016 - 3-Color Sunburst — $999
item.description:
$999 · Very Good · Dennis's Gear Locker

Played very little, some brush marks on back. Includes Fender Deluxe Molded Hardshell Case, selling for $259.99 currently on Ebay. The bass plays great, neck straight, tuners keep strings in tune consistently. You probably know of the specs. To give you a quick rundown. Body/Alder, Finish/Urethane, Bridge/4-Saddle HiMass Vintage (String-Through Body or Top Load),3-Color Sunburst Body,Rosewood Fingerboard/Maple Neck/Medium Jumbo Frets/C-Neck Shape/Bridge and Neck Pickups both AmericanStandard Single-Coil Jazz Bass. If you have any questions please contact me. Thanks for looking. Dennis

item.title: Washburn Bantam Series XB100 4-String Bass Guitar – Classic Black — $129.95
item.description:
$129.95 · Good · Butler Music

Bring home the solid, punchy tone of the . Known for its exceptional build quality and effortless playability, this 4-string electric bass is the ultimate weapon for advancing players, budget-conscious studio recordings, or gigging musicians needing a rock-solid backup. This bass weighs 7 pounds, 11.8 ounces and it includes a gig bag. These are actual photos of the one you will get. 

Why You’ll Love It

  • Ergonomic Bantam Body: Features a sleek, lightweight offset double-cutaway mahogany body that balances perfectly on a strap or your knee.
  • Fast, Comfortable Neck: The smooth bolt-on maple neck paired with a 20-fret rosewood fingerboard offers an ultra-comfortable 34" full scale layout.
  • Punchy P-Bass Power: Outfitted with a high-output split-coil WB100 pickup and straightforward volume/tone controls to instantly dial in everything from deep, classic thumps to bright funk tones.
  • Road-Ready Look: Finished in a timeless, stage-ready gloss black finish with chrome hardware.

Specs at a Glance

  • Body: Mahogany / Poplar blend
  • Neck / Fretboard: Maple / Rosewood
  • Scale Length: 34" (Full Scale)
  • Pickups: 1 x Passive P-Style Split-Coil
  • Controls: 1 Volume, 1 Tone

Condition Note

This bass is in Good Used Condition. It has been fully tested, and all electronics, knobs, and pickups function perfectly with zero scratchy pots. It shows normal, cosmetic signs of gentle play wear (minor surface swirls/light scratches in the clear coat typical of a gloss black guitar), but free of major dings or structural damage. Ready to plug in and play!

The History of Washburn Guitars

Though our roots are firmly planted through providing some of history's most well known, best valued and best selling acoustic and Americana instruments, your dreams have remained an important part of fulfilling our mission- to provide you with the perfect tool to achieve them. From the first Washburn electric built in 1976, everyone from beginners taking their first step into the bright stage lights to seasoned professionals commanding the attention of thousands of screaming fans have found a home here at Washburn. From rock, metal, country, bluegrass and jazz, there is a Washburn electric guitar that will fit you and your style perfectly and grow with you as you develop your style and technique.

We have a legacy of famous and talented artists who have helped shape the soundscape of today's modern music, from Nancy Wilson and Howard Leese with Heart, to the rise of hard rock's and metal's glory years with Rudy Sarzo and Nuno Bettencourt- who is celebrating 25 years with us; through the grunge years where icons like Dimebag Darrel kept guitar solos alive until passing the torch to Ola Englund and Marzi Montazeri. The list goes on and is growing everyday. Whether you strive to join that list, or are happy to push your "likes" on YouTube, or just want to have some fun with family and friends in the basement or backyard- we have the perfect fit for you no matter your taste or skill level.

  •

item.title: Ibanez A104 / AFR104 Affirma 1992 - 1995 #0669 (Nice) — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Very Good · ClarenceSale

A beautiful bass. I know I'm going to regret selling this. It was my dream bass for a long time, but I've mostly been keeping it in it's case. It plays incredible, but I'm always worried about anything happening to it. I have one of the 2019 reissues, I got it so I can have a similar feel and not worry about it, and I play that a lot. So after a lot of consideration, I'm selling this so someone might truly appreciate it.

The hinge on the case has come off. The bass itself has little wear, only above the thumb rest. Aside from that, it just has a few minor dings and scratches that aren't too noticeable. According to my scale, the weight is 7lbs, 5.9oz.

Let me know if you have any questions, concerns, or need anything.

item.title: Fender Limited Edition American Ultra Precision Bass 2024 - Tiger Eye — $3,500
item.description:
$3,500 · Excellent · Zephrio

Fender Limited-Edition American Ultra Precision Bass Guitar in Tiger's Eye.  
The bass is in Mint Condition.  I bought it for collectors purposes and I Never played it, hence why I'm selling it and I need to calm down my Gear Acquisition Syndrome. Comes with all the tags, accessories and hard shell case.


Description from Fender:

The Fender American Ultra P-Bass Tiger's Eye brings Fender's most coveted bass into the future with ultramodern enhancements. Outfitted with Fender's latest innovations, this versatile 4-string bass provides endless tonal inspiration. The gorgeous Tiger's Eye-finished  maple top on the contoured alder body is both ergonomic and visually arresting. Its Modern D neck profile and Ultra rolled fingerboard edges offer hours of playing comfort. The compound 10"–14" radius ebony fingerboard allows fluid fingering across the entire register. The Ultra Noiseless pickups unlock a vast tonal palette, from vintage warmth to modern snap, all without a hint of hum. With its sculpted rear-body contours and eye-catching finish, this bass is as sleek as it is ergonomic. Lightweight vintage-style tuners provide rock-solid intonation, while the premium hardshell case safely transports your instrument.

Modern D Neck Profile Optimized for Endurance

The Modern D neck profile on the American Ultra P Bass is ideal for marathon practice sessions and lengthy gigs. Its asymmetrical contouring allows your thumb to lock in comfortably behind the neck. Ultra rolled fingerboard edges maximize playing ease up and down the maple fingerboard. The sculpted neck heel provides effortless access to the upper registers. Taken together, these modern enhancements provide fatigue-free performance.

Compound Radius Ebony Fingerboard for Fluid Playability

The compound 10"–14" radius ebony fingerboard allows low-friction fingering across all 21 jumbo frets. Near the nut, the fingerboard is flatter for comfortable open-position chording. Further up the neck, it progresses to a more rounded curve, facilitating easy soloing and string-skipping. The narrow-tall frets are expertly finished for silky slides up and down the neck. The compound ebony fingerboard lets your ideas flow freely from your brain to your fingertips.

Ultra Noiseless Pickups Deliver Endless Tonal Range

A pair of Ultra Noiseless Vintage pickups unlock a vast universe of pristine tones, from vintage warmth to modern snap and everything between. The split-coil design eliminates hum, even at high gain settings. Powerful ceramic magnets provide authoritative lows, articulate mids and crystalline highs. Various wiring schemes allow even more tonal shaping.

Ergonomic and Striking Contoured Alder Body and Maple Top

The contoured alder body is comfortable on the player and visually arresting on stage. The deeply scooped cutaway allows easy access to the highest frets, while the contoured forearm and rear upper bout rests assure fatigue-free playing in any position. Combined with the forearm contour, the asymmetrical neck joint provides a seamless transition all across the fingerboard.

For bassists seeking endless inspiration, the Fender American Ultra P Bass Tiger's Eye provides ultramodern enhancements to a classic design. Its comfortable Modern D neck profile, smooth compound radius fingerboard and Noiseless pickups will keep you playing for hours. Order the Fender American Ultra P Bass Tiger's Eye and unlock your creative potential.

Features

  • Contoured alder body with flamed maple top
  • Ultra satin urethane-finished maple neck with streaked ebony fingerboard
  • 10"–14" compound radius fingerboard with 21 medium-jumbo frets for effortless playability
  • Modern D neck profile with rolled edges for hours of comfort
  • Ultra Noiseless Vintage pickups and advanced wiring for endless tone

SpecsNeck

  • Wood: Maple
  • Shape: Modern D
  • Neck joint: 5-Bolt
  • Scale length: 34" (86.36 cm)
  • Truss rod: Bi-Flex
  • Finish: Ultra satin urethane with gloss headstock face

Pickups

  • Pickup Configuration: SS
  • Bridge: Ultra Noiseless Vintage Jazz Bass
  • Middle: Ultra Noiseless Vintage Precision Bass
  • Control layout: Master Volume, Pan Pot (Pickup Selector), Treble Boost/Cut, Midrange Boost/Cut, Bass Boost/Cut, Passive Tone, Active/Passive Mini Toggle

Fretboard

  • Material: Streaked Ebony
  • Fret size: Medium-Jumbo
  • Number of frets: 21
  • Inlays: White Pearloid Dot
  • Nut material/width: Bone/1.625" (41.3 mm)

Body

  • Body wood: Alder
  • Top wood: Flame Maple
  • Body finish: Gloss Urethane

Hardware

  • Bridge/tailpiece: 4-Saddle HiMass (top loaded)
  • Tuning machines: Fender "F" lightweight Vintage-Paddle keys with tapered shafts
  • Color: Nickel/Chrome

Other

  • Number of strings: 4-string
  • Case: Molded case
  • Orientation: Right-handed

item.title: Ibanez EHB1505MS - Black Ice Flat w/ Panga w/Gig Bag & PLEK*D #545 — $1,899.99
item.description:
$1,899.99 · Brand New · C&M Music Center - Lafayette

PLEK*D!

FREE Plek and Setup included with this purchase, $299 value Included!

We now offer a full PLEK service along with a set-up and string change on all guitars purchased from us! The PLEK is accurate to 1:1000 of a millimeter and will get all of your frets in order for perfect playability. Please contact us before your purchase to discuss the PLEK service!

The guitar that is listed in the photos IS the ACTUAL guitar! This serial is #I231200545

Please see photos and message or call us with any pricing questions

or for a detailed "on hand" description.

Lafayette, LA 70503

item.title: Fender American Ultra Jazz Bass Maple Fingerboard Cobra Blue 2024 - Cobra Blue — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · Zephrio

Fender American Ultra Jazz Bass Maple Fingerboard Cobra Blue.


The bass is in Excellent Condition with less then 10 hours of playing time on it.  No dings, it's in perfect like new condition.  I bought it for collectors purposes and I Never played it, hence why I'm selling it.  Trying to to calm down my Gear Acquisition Syndrome. Comes with all the tags, accessories and hard shell case.


Description

The Fender American Ultra Jazz Bass raises the bar for sonic superiority and playing comfort. The American Ultra series is Fender's most advanced line, catering to discerning musicians who require the utmost in precision, tone and feel from their instruments. The American Ultra Jazz Bass's unique "Modern D" shaped neck has rolled edges for endless hours of comfortable playability, while its compound 10"-14" radius fingerboard with 21 medium jumbo frets allows for effortless soloing across the neck.

Ultra-Quiet Pickups Provide Endless Tonal Options

Fender Ultra NoiselessTM pickups power the American Ultra Jazz Bass with a pure, full-bodied voice for any style. An active/passive mini toggle switch lets you choose between the crisp clarity of the active preamp or the warm, classic sound of the passive circuit. A redesigned control layout with master volume, pickup pan, bass, mid, treble and passive tone controls provides a wealth of tonal variations so you can shape your perfect sound.

Premium Components for Superior Performance

From its solid alder body to the bone nut, the American Ultra Jazz Bass is built with nothing but the finest components for peerless playability and tone. It features a modern bolt on maple neck with satin urethane finish, as well as Fender's lightest vintage style tuners for superior tuning stability. A HiMass vintage style bridge provides rock-solid intonation and sustain.

Inspiring Design Meets Road-Ready Durability

With its sleek contours, vibrant finish and chrome hardware, the American Ultra Jazz Bass makes a stunning statement on stage. It also comes with a molded hardshell case to keep it protected when traveling between gigs. Play the Fender American Ultra Jazz Bass and experience the new standard of electric bass excellence.

Features

  • Alder or ash body (dependent on finish)
  • “Modern D”-shaped neck profile
  • 10”-14” compound-radius fingerboard
  • 21 medium-jumbo frets
  • Two Noiseless Vintage single-coil Jazz Bass pickups
  • Redesigned active/passive preamp
  • Includes hardshell case

4543 Johnston St.

Lafayette, LA 70503

*FREE SHIPPING - USA ONLY*PLEK*D!

  • Number of Strings: 4
  • Left-/Right-handed: Right-handed
  • Body Shape: American Ultra II Precision Bass
  • Body Material: Select Alder
  • Body Finish: Gloss Urethane
  • Color: Ultraburst
  • Neck Material: Quartersawn Maple
  • Neck Shape: Modern D
  • Neck Joint: Bolt-on
  • Radius: 10"-14" Compound
  • Fingerboard Material: Quartersawn Maple
  • Fingerboard Inlay: Dots
  • Number of Frets: 21, Medium Jumbo
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Nut Width: 1.625"
  • Nut Material: GraphTech Tusq
  • Bridge/Tailpiece: 4-Saddle Adjustable HiMass
  • Tuners: Fender "F" Light-Weight Vintage-Paddle
  • Neck Pickup: Fender Ultra II Noiseless Vintage Precision Split-coil
  • Bridge Pickup: Fender Ultra II Noiseless Vintage Jazz Single-coil
  • Controls: 1 x volume (S-1 switch active/passive), 1 x Pan, 1 x stacked mid/passive tone, 1 x stacked treble/bass
  • Switching: 1 x mini-switch (Mid Freq: 325Hz, 750Hz)
  • Strings: Fender 7250M, .045-.105
  • Case/Gig Bag: Hardshell Case
  • Manufacturer Part Number: 0199102712

item.title: Gibson Thunderbird IV Nikki Sixx Signature 2009 - Satin Red — $3,098.29
item.description:
$3,098.29 · Very Good · bassNguitar

All original rare signature! Maple sides, ebony fingerboard. Comes within original snakeskin case.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.title: Fender Musicmaster Bass 1972 - 1979 - Olympic White — $950
item.description:
$950 · Fair · Daniel’s Music Shop

Has cosmetic wear throughout, a missing thumb rest, and a pickup that does not raise or lower. Neck is in good condition. It is currently equipped with a Seymour Duncan but will ship with the original Pickup.

item.title: Fender Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 1975 Natural w/OHSC USED — $3,250
item.description:
$3,250 · Excellent · Atlanta Vintage Guitars

Fender Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 1975 Natural w/OHSC USED Very Light weight and very resonant .. 8.8 lbs on our digital scale ...these are great deals and very affordable vintage !!

item.title: Gibson SG Standard Bass 2010's - Heritage Cherry — $1,300
item.description:
$1,300 · Excellent · Josh Garrels Used Gear

Selling my Gibson SG Bass Guitar. I bought this SG new from Sweetwater over a decade ago strictly for studio use, and it's only been played a handful of times since. The bass players I record with all arrive with their own favored studio set-ups, so this beautiful instrument hasn't seen much play. It's time for this SG to make some music in a good home with a good player, rather than serve as an expensive decoration in my studio! This is the bass version of grandmas new car that sat in her garage for a decade accumulating almost no mileage - are you ready to take it for a spin?

* Short-scale bass with big humbucking tone
* Mahogany body and neck give you a warm, rich tone
* Comfortable SG-style body
* Shorter 30-inch scale length is easy to play, comfortable for beginners, and enhances tone
* 3-point adjustable bridge maximizes sustain and tuning stability
* Vintage-looking nitrocellulose finish
* Dual humbucking pickups deliver the classic Gibson bass growl

item.title: Carvin SB-5000 - Red quilt — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Very Good · Tom's Gear Depot

This is closer to excellent condition. Plays great. Just doesn’t get the play it deserves. I’m a guitar player.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass - Sunburst — $703.23
item.description:
$703.23 · Very Good · Guitar Paradise Music Store

Standard Jazz Bass - Corpo in Ontano Manico in Acero e Tastiera in Palissandro, con borsa non originale inclusa.

Il suono che ha creato leggende. Sin dalla sua introduzione nel 1960, il Fender Jazz Bass è stato la scelta dei bassisti professionisti di ogni genere per il suono ricco e versatile. Nella nuova veste dal 2009, lo Standard Jazz Bass incorpora il meglio di vecchio e nuovo, con moderni pickup single coil, cavità del corpo schermate, tasti medium jumbo, ponte vintage-style Fender, manico verniciato, battipenna a tre strati e logo anni '70.

Sono presenti dei piccoli graffi e parti dove è saltata la vernice.

item.title: Used 2023 Fender American Pro II Jazz Bass White w/case TSU25496 — $1,199.99
item.description:
$1,199.99 · Very Good · Tone Shop Guitars

Year: 2023
Serial #: US23088593
Weight: 9lb 1.3oz
Notes: Has Fender Custom Shop 60s pickups, originals are in the case. There is some discoloration on the back of the body from where a decal was. There are also some small marks or blemishes on the body.

Tone Shop Guitars is THE destination guitar shop in the Dallas-Fort Worth area, with three locations in Addison, Southlake, and Fort Worth. Every used instrument we sell has been personally inspected by our team and is set up and ready to play. We stand behind everything we sell — stop in and play it before you buy, or reach out with any questions.

item.title: MINT Fender Vintera II '70s Competition Mustang Bass with Rosewood Fretboard Competition Burgundy — $949
item.description:
$949 · Excellent · Vintage bass trader

An absolute MINT Fender Vintera II 70’s Competition Mustang Bass in Competition Burgundy finish with original Fender branded gig bag. It still has the plastic protection on the neck plate, pick guard and tuners, the tag on the gig bag and unopened brochure/wrench. Purchased for a project, set up, tested (sounds and plays great) and stored in a temprature controlled studio. Weighs 7lbs 13oz.

It will be bubble wrapped, put in the gig bag and packed in the original box. Please reach out with any further questions. Thanks for looking!

$99 shipping to the lower 48

item.title: Fender MIJ Junior Collection Jazz Bass 2021 - Present - Satin Shell Pink — $999
item.description:
$999 · Good · PJ's Sweet Shoppe

Selling my long time workhorse bass. I'm not gigging really anymore and I find that I haven't really reached for this bass in a year or so since getting a custom build and a USA Short Scale Stingray.

This one has one of the thinner necks I've played compared to other jazz jr's. It measures about ~0.79" at the 1st fret and has a nice smooth satin finish up and down the neck.

I had 3/8" UL's installed at one point, if you're interested in a set of USA clover UL's, I can throw those in for an extra $75. This one has picked up a number of chips on the body. This is unfortunately pretty normal with the shell pink finish Fender uses nowadays, I've had three shell pink instruments from them and all have a number of paint chips. There's a few marks on the side of the neck as well. They don't affect playability. I only noticed them because I did a look-over the bass before listing.

weights 7.63lbs on the postal scale.

includes a handful of aftermarket pickguards, including (i) the tortoise shell one currently on the bass, (ii) mint green, (iii) pink mirror and (iv) stock white one.

item.title: Jackson JS2 4-String Electric Bass Guitar — $200
item.description:
$200 · Very Good · GravityMusicGear

  • Make/Model: Jackson JS2 4-String Bass Guitar
  • Serial Number: CWJ2113349
  • Location of Manufacture: China
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Nut Width: 1 5/8"
  • Weight: 8.2lbs
  • Finish Color: Arctic White
  • Pickup/Control Layout: B/N Humbucker Pickups, Volume, Volume, Tone
  • Neck Wood: Maple
  • Fingerboard Wood: Rosewood
  • Case: Does Not Include case, but will be professionally packed and shipped
  • Features: 24 Frets, Shark Fin inlays, Black Hardware w/ Diecast Jackson Tuning Machines
  • Condition: This is a fantastic bass guitar in excellent condition! No notable cosmetic wear to speak of. The body looks great, the neck is straight and smooth, the fretboard is clean and the frets are polished. The frets themselves show light play marks, but no indents or major fretwear. The headstock is in excellent shape and even the end point is free of the usual dings or chips. This is a great bass ready to rock with brand new strings and setup. Because this is a preowned instrument be sure to inspect photos carefully before purchase. All electronics have been tested and are in working condition. Everything which is included is pictured and is ready to be professionally packed and shipped.

06272026-25 KADK

Neck straight, frets clean, controls functioning normally.

item.title: Suhr - Classic P — $2,999
item.description:
$2,999 · Excellent · My Reverb Shop

I already regret this, but I’ve fallen on hard times. Weight = 8lbs 13oz. Specs in pics. Currently strung with Labella copper white nylon strings.

item.title: Stonefly™ Bass #030 by Handcrafted by Stuart Spector Black Stain Fretless — $5,095
item.description:
$5,095 · Brand New · Esopus Guitars

Offered here is Stonefly™ Bass #030 Black Stain with a Spruce Top ($4495.00), and a Fretless Ebony Fretboard ($300.00) with Ghost Side Lines ($300.00).

This listing includes the bass in its Road Runner case.

In New York's Hudson Valley, nestled in the foothills of the Catskill mountains, lies Stuart Spector’s Esopus Guitars workshop. From his humble start in the mid 1970s building guitars and basses in Brooklyn NY, to his current handcrafted Esopus Guitars and Basses, Stuart has mastered the best techniques, as well as the selection of woods and premium components, to create for you the ultimate instrument experience.

Stonefly™ Bass features include a Fully Carved Top, a slim 2" chambered alder body, a remarkably playable 32" scale, and the legendary Stuart Spector neck shape. Full bass specs are shown on our website, EsopusGuitars.com.

Please message with any questions and thanks for looking!

STONEFLY™ BASS SPECIFICATIONS

  • Hand Signed and Numbered by Stuart Spector.
  • Fully Carved Top (inside & outside surfaces).
  • Unique Esopus Thumbrest Carved into the Top.
  • Hand Selected Alder Fully Chambered Body with Binding on Body Top.
  • Esopus TonePort™ : A Removable Sound Port on the Back of the Body, held in place by Magnets. Removing this gives louder and more open sounding acoustic tones.
  • Three Piece Quartersawn Maple Neck with distinctive Stuart Spector Neck Shape.  
  • 32" Scale. Fretboard with 21 Frets.
  • Ebony Bridge, Tailpiece, and Peghead Veneer.
  • Ebony Truss Rod Cover with Esopus Trout Inlay.
  • Custom-Made Fishman Piezo Pickup in the Bridge, wired directly to the Output Jack. (Use with your favorite outboard preamp)
  • Hipshot Ultralite Tuning Machines.
  • Dunlop Dual Design Strap Buttons.
  • Body Dimensions : Length 22", Waist 10.25", Upper Bout 11.25", Lower Bout 15.5", Body Depth 2.15" Top to Rear.
  • Total Instrument Weight : Approx. Six Pounds.

item.title: Jackson Antigravity AG4Q 2010-2020 — $3,343.05
item.description:
$3,343.05 · Very Good · Thib's Gear Bazaar

NORD || Envoi possible, vente privilégiée


Bonjour,

Suite à un acheteur fantôme je remets en vente cette Basse Gaucher Jackson Custom Shop AG4Q très atypique.


💰 Prix : 2800 euros

Très bon état, vendue avec une housse Tweed.


Instrument toujours bien entretenu et utilisé dans un environnement non-fumeur. 

Pas de concerts à son actif.


Caractéristiques:

  • Corps en épicéa massif
  • Manche en 3 parties de palissandre avec points de renfort en graphite
  • Touche en bois de rose de Madagascar avec petits repères "Mères des perles"
  • Sillet en os
  • Diapason 35"
  • 24 frettes jumbo
  • Mécaniques Hipshot Ultralight
  • Chevalet Hipshot
  • Micros : Seymour Duncan Basslines
  • Potentiomètres en bois de rose
  • Câblage custom, électronique passive (préamp Bartolini)


📍 Visible et essayable à Croix, dans le Nord. 

📦 Envoi possible à vos frais par Chronopost ou Mondial Relais.


N’hésitez pas à me contacter pour plus d’informations, photos supplémentaires ou pour venir l’essayer !

Musicalement 🤘

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Sterling 4H USA 2013 - Black Gloss w/ Maple Fretboard — $1,525
item.description:
$1,525 · Excellent · The Bass Garage

2013 Ernie Ball MusicMan Sterling 4H Bass (made in USA) for sale. The Sterling model has a downsized, lightweight body and comfortable, slim neck profile compared to the StingRay. The only reason I’m selling it is because I have two Sterling 4H basses now.


Specs:

- Black high gloss finish with a beautiful red tort pickguard

- Swamp ash body

- Maple neck and maple fretboard - 1.5” nut width like a Jazz bass, EBMM’s special Tru oil and hand-rubbed special wax blend finish on back of neck, truss rod wheel

- MusicMan humbucker with ceramic magnets and a built-in hum-canceling phantom coil

- Active 9V 3-band preamp (bass, mids, treble) and 3-way switch (series, single coil, parallel)

- Chrome hardware

- Near mint condition. Neck is straight, no fret buzz even with low action, truss rod turns in both directions. The only blems I can find are a tiny dot on the tip of the headstock and a tiny dimple in the body right by the knobs, as pictured.

- 8.9lbs on my scale

- Comes with an EBMM hardshell case

item.title: Pre-owned Warrior DM5 Dran Michael 5 String Bass w/case — $5,299.99
item.description:
$5,299.99 · Excellent · Mom's Music

9lbs 14oz.

Excellent condition. Functions as it should and plays wonderfully. Bartolini pickups. Ash, maple and purpleheart neck-thru body. Birdseye Maple fretboard. Almost zero fretwear. No COA. Includes case. See pics. Neck is wide and shallow, very fast playing. Have reached out to Warrior for more info, they have not responded. 

The Warrior Dran Michael 5 String (often abbreviated as DM5) is a flagship, boutique electric bass guitar handcrafted in the United States by Warrior Instruments in Rossville, Georgia. Renowned for its exceptional build quality, exotic wood selection, and lightweight design, it is considered a high-end instrument often compared to a "master-forged Samurai sword" of bass guitars.

Construction: Available in both bolt-on and neck-through designs. The neck-through models often feature multi-piece laminates (e.g., Maple/Walnut/Purpleheart) for stability and sustain.
Woods: Bodies frequently utilize Swamp Ash or Alder wings with exotic tops such as Flamed Maple, Quilted Maple, Koa, Buckeye Burl, Zebrawood, or Cocobolo. Necks are typically Maple with exotic skunk stripes or tone bars (e.g., Purpleheart, Wenge).

Electronics: Most models come equipped with active electronics, commonly featuring Bartolini pickups (Fat Boy/Jazz combinations) and preamps.

Since 1979, we at Mom's Music have worked hard to make the Louisville, KY music scene something special.  Now, we’re working hard to share what makes us great with the world.  We take pride in our care and attention to detail regarding every instrument and musician that comes through the store, and every instrument we receive gets a thorough inspection and setup when it arrives in our shop and prior to shipment.
All orders placed will require a signature upon arrival.  If a different arrangement is preferred, send us a message or give us a call.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass with Maple Fretboard - Olympic White — $1,290
item.description:
$1,290 · Excellent · Zheng's Gear Bazaar

Excellent Fender Jazz Bass. You know what you are looking at. I just got too many basses, need to free up some space.

item.title: Ibanez Acoustic Bass PCBE12MH — $159
item.description:
$159 · Good · Lefa Pedals

Excellent playing Ibanez acoustic-electric bass in good overall condition. Lightweight, comfortable, and perfect for practice, songwriting, or unplugged sessions. The built-in Ibanez AEQ2T preamp with onboard tuner works perfectly and sounds great plugged in.

The bass shows normal cosmetic wear with a few small dings and scratches from regular use (see photos), but is fully functional and ready to play.

Features:

  • Mahogany top, back & sides
  • Ibanez AEQ2T preamp with built-in tuner
  • Comfortable slim neck
  • Great unplugged volume and balanced amplified tone

Passive Sadowsky soapbar pickups into the 2-band preamp with mid-boost, Hipshot bridge and vintage style tuners in chrome. Comes with its Certificate of Authenticity signed by Roger Sadowsky. Light at 3.450 kg.

A MasterBuilt singlecut five-string with an alder body and a roasted maple neck on a morado fingerboard. Passive Sadowsky soapbar pickups into the 2-band preamp with mid-boost, Hipshot bridge and tuners in chrome. Comes with its Certificate of Authenticity signed by Roger Sadowsky. 3.708 kg.

item.title: Fender Mustang Bass – Fretless – Seymour Duncan PJ Upgrade – Direct Output Bypass Switch – — $450
item.description:
$450 · Good · Lefa Pedals

Up for sale is my Fender Mustang Bass (Made in Mexico), professionally converted to a fully fretless instrument with a smooth rosewood fingerboard. It plays beautifully and has a warm, singing tone with plenty of growl when needed.

This bass has been upgraded well beyond stock and is perfect for players looking for a versatile fretless that can go from vintage to modern tones.

Upgrades

  • Seymour Duncan PJ pickup set
  • Direct output bypass switch: routes the pickups straight to the output jack, completely bypassing the volume and tone controls for the purest, hottest signal possible.
  • 3-position pickup selector switch:
    • Neck pickup
    • Neck + Bridge
    • Bridge pickup
  • Fully fretless conversion with side position markers.

Controls

  • Master Volume
  • Master Tone
  • 3-way pickup selector
  • Direct bypass switch (true passive bypass of the controls)

The bass is in good used condition with honest cosmetic wear, dings, and finish chips from normal use, as shown in the photos. Everything works as it should, and the upgrades make it a unique instrument that stands out from a stock Mustang Bass.

The Seymour Duncan pickups deliver a much fuller and more articulate sound than the factory electronics, while the bypass switch is great for recording or when you want maximum output and clarity.

Feel free to message me with any questions or if you’d like additional photos.

Thanks for looking!

item.title: Ibanez MDB1 Mike D’Antonio Killswitch Engage Signature Bass Guitar Black Flat — $1,119.83
item.description:
$1,119.83 · Very Good · R&T Music

Preowned and in excellent condition! 
Comes with Gigbag and fully setup by our in-house tech. 

Ibanez MDB1 Bass Guitar in excellent condition - fully set up!


The MDB1 is a solid body electric bass model introduced by Ibanez for 2007. It is the initial signature model for American bassist Mike D'Antonio who is best known for his work with the metalcore band Killswitch Engage. It was made in South Korea.


The MDB1 is based on the SRX700. It features neck through body construction with light ash wings on a maple and walnut neck with a 24-fret rosewood fingerboard with a seven pointed star logo at the twelfth fret. The body is a Soundgear shape with a medusa graphic on the face over a flat black finish. Components include a pair of Ibanez passive humbucking bass pickups with a low-impedence EQB2DX preamp and a single volume control, an Accu-cast fixed bridge, a plastic nut and Gotoh tuning machines.

item.title: Squier 40th Anniversary Vintage Edition Precision Bass 2022 - Present - Satin Dakota Red — $400
item.description:
$400 · Excellent · Osiris' Gear

Up for sale is my Squier 40th Anniversary Vintage Edition P Bass in Dakota Red Satin. I bought this when they were released and it's sat in a case ever since. I am finally deciding to move it on to someone who would actually play it. It's in literal brand new condition with no dings, no scuffs, no marks and plastic is still on the pickups. Will ship double boxed and extra padded to avoid any damage. Can include a brand new Levy's wide leather strap if interested.

item.title: Ibanez TMB35-MGR Standard Talman Bass - DELANO Pickups! — $476.38
item.description:
$476.38 · Excellent · Arthur's Guitar Gear

Up for sale excelent condition 5 string short scale Ibanez bass with upgraded pickups to :
Delano JMVC 5 FE/M2 B and Delano PMVC 5 FE/M2!
Pickups itself cost 250 eu.
Those were well worth the money - massive punchy sound which can be heard in the mix.
Bass was used only in studio enviroment and record multiple great tracks.
Short scale is really your best friend for recordings in tight enviroment especially if you are a guitarist!
Bass going with the gigbag.

item.title: Vox Starstream Bass 2S in Pearl White - Short Scale — $382.06
item.description:
$382.06 · Excellent · Arthur's Guitar Gear

Up for sale this ultimate lightweight short scale jazz bass guitar by VOX.
Used only in studio, made multiple recordings, easy, no hassle playing thanks to super thin neck.
Great companion for guitarists looking to record some bass line without problems!
All in perfect condition, original gigbag included.
